title: SIFTA Skill Trade Offer
description: Thin schema appended to the stigmergic field to index a community skill offer.

skill_name.description: Name of the skill being offered

skill_sha256.description: Cryptographic hash of the skill procedure body

stgm_price.description: Cost in STGM tokens to pull this skill

provider_node.description: Homeworld serial of the node offering the skill

provider_trace.description: Trace ID of the doctor who verified the skill

truth_label.description: Receipt truth label for the offer row
